note: Manifest for produced step-animation clips. Key contract: {action}-{motif}-{glyph} where action is one of the STEP_ART scene types (purge|unload|wipe|label|hang|fold|photo|contain|group|moveUp|moveDown|zones|done), motif is the furniture the scene is staged on (shelves|drawers|rail|bench), and glyph is the item being moved (shoe|hanger|foldedclothes|towel|jar|can|bottle|utensil|tool|tote|plate|bag). Files live at media/steps/{key}.(mp4|webm|json) — mp4/webm play natively, json is Lottie and needs a vendored player before it will be used. Each entry: { file, status: ready|pending, license { type, owner, note } }. The inline animated SVG scenes in js/screens/results.js are the authoritative spec each clip must match (empty = items OUT into a box, wipe = cloth along the surface, and so on) and remain the runtime fallback for every key not declared ready here. tests/step-media.test.mjs fails the build on unknown vocabulary in a key, a ready file missing from disk, or a pending entry whose file already exists.
